data.name: Mosin-Nagant

weaponImprint.name: Samosek
weaponImprint.trait: Attacks ignore 1 point of stability index. When possessing [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], attacks additionally ignore another 1 point of stability index.
weaponImprint.effect: Phase damage is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. Electric damage is increased by another 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to PMCs by 2.5%. If the target has [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887|doll:mosin-nagant], increase it by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A Doll who loves to help others and strives to improve her negative mindset. Her motto is to never avoid challenges; once motivated, she gives her all. While negative thoughts may linger in her neural cloud, her radiant smile and enthusiastic actions surely inspire many of her companions.

skills.name: Patrol Time
skills.description: Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Helping Others
skills.description: When an allied unit attacks an enemy unit outside of turn but within range, if that enemy unit is in Stability Break, Mosin-Nagant performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of her attack and 2 points of stability damage. This effect can trigger up to 2 times per turn. After a Support Attack, gains 2 points of Confectance Index and also gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: When an allied unit attacks an enemy unit outside of turn but within range, if that enemy unit is in Stability Break, Mosin-Nagant performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of her attack and 2 points of stability damage. This effect can trigger up to 2 times per turn. After a Support Attack, gains 2 points of Confectance Index and also gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 2 turns. Before the Support Attack, gains 1 stack of [effect:92c897fb-6469-4746-9cdf-ff28c46af53b|doll:mosin-nagant].
skills.descriptionLevel3: When an allied unit attacks an enemy unit outside of turn but within range, if that enemy unit is in Stability Break, Mosin-Nagant performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of her attack and 2 points of stability damage. When an Electric debuff is applied to an enemy target outside of turn, it triggers [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd]. Support Attack can trigger up to 3 times per turn. After a Support Attack, gains 2 points of Confectance Index and also gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 2 turns. Before the Support Attack, gains 1 stack of [effect:92c897fb-6469-4746-9cdf-ff28c46af53b|doll:mosin-nagant].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Before performing a Support Attack, gains 1 stack of [effect:92c897fb-6469-4746-9cdf-ff28c46af53b|doll:mosin-nagant].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When an Electric debuff is applied to an enemy target outside of turn, gains [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd]. The maximum number of Support Attack increases by 1.

skills.name: Target Victory
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to them. After the attack, applies [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to them. After the attack, applies [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] for 1 turn. If a phase weakness is exploited, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If a phase weakness is exploited, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

skills.name: Positive Mindset
skills.description: Gain 1 stack of [effect:2d13f069-d66b-4c4a-bf22-0250bfe136d6] and [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] once. Every 3 times this skill is used, gain [effect:6d003257-ef97-4bc2-9bc5-7353dc53c2b5]. Cannot be used more than once per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Gain 1 stack of [effect:2d13f069-d66b-4c4a-bf22-0250bfe136d6] and [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] once. Every 2 times this skill is used, gain [effect:6d003257-ef97-4bc2-9bc5-7353dc53c2b5]. Cannot be used more than once per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increase damage dealt in [effect:92c897fb-6469-4746-9cdf-ff28c46af53b|doll:mosin-nagant] by additional 10%. Every 2 times this skill is used, gain [effect:6d003257-ef97-4bc2-9bc5-7353dc53c2b5].

skills.name: Declaration of Victory
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 180% of attack to them. If a phase weakness is exploited, applies [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] to the target after the attack for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 180% of attack to them. If a phase weakness is exploited, applies [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] to the target after the attack for 1 turn. Gains 1 stack of [effect:ac2ec793-335a-41fb-9e4d-4a8709c6f484] for each Support Attack, lasting until the next Ultimate skill is used.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 180% of attack to them. If a phase weakness is exploited, applies [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] to the target after the attack for 1 turn. Gains 1 stack of [effect:ac2ec793-335a-41fb-9e4d-4a8709c6f484] for each Support Attack, lasting until the next Ultimate skill is used. Gains 1 point of Confectance Index for each stack of [effect:ac2ec793-335a-41fb-9e4d-4a8709c6f484] after using an Ultimate skill.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Gains 1 stack of [effect:ac2ec793-335a-41fb-9e4d-4a8709c6f484] after each Support Attack.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Gains 1 point of Confectance Index for each stack of [effect:ac2ec793-335a-41fb-9e4d-4a8709c6f484] after using an Ultimate skill.

keys.effect: When this unit is under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], increases damage dealt by 7%.

When allied units attempt to apply [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] on the target, Mosin-Nagant applies [effect:19266f8c-b473-4306-beda-ef4e7ddcd5f3] on the target for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered up to once per round.
If the target has [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887], increase stability damage they take by 2 points.
When Target Victory deals Electric damage, applies [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] for 1 turn instead of [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d].
If the target has [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887], applies 2 debuffs to them before launching an attack.
When using the active skill Positive Mindset, if the user has [effect:6d003257-ef97-4bc2-9bc5-7353dc53c2b5], their attacks ignore 15% of Cover damage reduction.
When possessing [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], reduce stability damage taken by 1 point.
If an active attack applies [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] to the target, this unit gains 3 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

vertebrae.effect: If a phase weakness is exploited, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

doll.name: Mosin-Nagant
doll.effects: A Doll who loves to help others and strives to improve her negative mindset. Her motto is to never avoid challenges; once motivated, she gives her all. While negative thoughts may linger in her neural cloud, her radiant smile and enthusiastic actions surely inspire many of her companions.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by Support Attacks is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Electric damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt against enemy units that are more than 5 tiles away is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

Attacks deal Electric damage, increasing damage by 30%, effective once. This buff cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"eb4618c4-4b50-414d-bc58-a22222a64a02","upgradeName":"V5","upgradeDetails":"

Attacks deal Electric damage, increasing damage by 40%. Triggers 1 time. This buff cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}
Electric damage taken from Mosin-Nagant is increased by 15%. This is considered a [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] effect. Considered an Electric debuff.
Applies [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] to the target for 1 turn before attacking. Activates 1 time. This is considered an Electric buff.
Increase the critical rate and critical damage of ultimate skills by 5%. Maximum of 4 stacks. This buff cannot be cleansed.
